title: MACHINA
description: A tech / exploration mod set in space!

> ## MACHINA is currently in Open Pre-Alpha
> Expect **bugs**, incomplete features & placeholders. _Please report any issues you encounter to the [issue tracker](https://github.com/Cy4Shot/MACHINA/issues/new)_.

## About

MACHINA is a tech / exploration mod. Explore infinite procedurally generated planets, build huge factories, and create your own adventure. Features include:

- Infinite physically accurate and fully explorable solar systems.
- Huge procedurally generated planets with unique biomes.
- Multiblock automation and machinery.
- Customizable and modular tools and gear.
- Spaceships and ship fuel automation.
- And so much more!

## Early Access

MACHINA is currently in **early access**. To follow development, peek our [website](https://machina.cy4.dev/) or join our [discord](https://discord.gg/SxCQZVQjvm). MACHINA is also [open source](https://www.github.com/Cy4Shot/MACHINA)!

## Contributors

The code, textures, music & sounds are made by Cy4, with some additional help from: TruePenut, Swacky, Marcatron, SpaceWalrus, woah. If you would like to become a contributor, message me on discord!
